name: fullstack-sync
description: Keep a client app and its backend API in sync: detect/fix endpoint-contract drift, scan docs & specs (OpenAPI/GraphQL/proto/route-files), scaffold endpoints across both repos, run and verify both sides. Built for Flutter + FastAPI, stack-agnostic. Safe by default: asks for the dir, then only nudges on contract drift — no tokens or commits unless you allow; hard mode is opt-in autopilot.
